responsibilities: Indicates the intended funding mechanism (GitHub Sponsors)
Provides instructions for enabling sponsorship when ready
outOfScope: Actual sponsorship setup or financial details
Any other funding sources or platforms

English.purpose: This document serves as a placeholder to configure GitHub Sponsors for the ArchSpine project once the feature is enabled.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for project maintainers and contributors who need to set up financial sponsorship support.
key_takeaways: GitHub Sponsors is not yet active for ArchSpine.
When ready, uncomment the sponsor line with the GitHub organization or username.
This is a minimal configuration stub, not a full funding policy.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 项目用于配置 GitHub Sponsors 的占位文件，待该功能启用后使用。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 面向项目维护者和贡献者，用于在准备就绪时设置资金赞助支持。
key_takeaways: ArchSpine 项目尚未启用 GitHub Sponsors。
准备就绪后，取消注释赞助行并填入 GitHub 组织或用户名。
这是一个极简的配置存根，并非完整的资金政策。
